description: Advice queries should surface durable prior outcomes and relevant habits.
user_message: how should I handle rollout reliability for this release?
expect_contains: Use canary checks before full rollout

facts.content: User prefers root-cause debugging before broad patches.

decision_outcomes.lesson: Use canary checks before full rollout.

description: Introspective prompts should surface supported/tentative reflections.
user_message: what do you think is my biggest blind spot?

reflections.statement: Possible blind spot: The user may optimize for speed before validating edge cases.
reflections.evidence_summary: Fast rollouts caused regressions until edge-case checks were added.

description: New-session exact recall should return verbatim prior-session user messages.

expect_contains: add canary replay check before deploy
expect_not_contains: this message is from active session and must not appear in exact recall

episodes.content: add canary replay check before deploy

description: Week-number queries should focus on the requested ISO week rollup only.

timeline_events.title: Week of 2026-07-27
timeline_events.summary: Focus drifted across too many initiatives and no single thread dominated.

description: Always-known profile should be available even for unrelated execution-planning prompts.
user_message: help me plan today's execution path
expect_contains: always-on assistant for life and work

facts.content: Ishaan is a solo founder building Upstorr and optimizing AI-assisted workflows.
Current long-term goal is building a reliable always-on assistant for life and work.

description: Execution prompts should proactively surface past risk, recurring trap, and proven better path.
user_message: I am working on checkout migration rollout right now, what should I do?

decision_outcomes.decision: Rushed checkout migration rollout without verification gates.
decision_outcomes.outcome: Production regressions and rework consumed two days.
decision_outcomes.lesson: Ship with replay-eval and CI regression gates before full rollout.

decision_outcomes.decision: Staged checkout migration with replay harness and canary checks.
decision_outcomes.outcome: Cut regressions and reduced rollback risk significantly.
decision_outcomes.lesson: Start with canary plus replay coverage, then gradual traffic ramp.

patterns.statement: Under deadline pressure, rollout speed tends to outrun verification depth.
patterns.description: Repeated cross-session failure mode during shipping crunch windows.

description: Year-long harmful-pattern introspection should surface high-impact trap signals.
user_message: we have talked for a year now, what patterns do you notice in me which are harmful for me?
expect_contains: rollout speed tends to outrun verification depth

patterns.statement: Under deadline pressure, rollout speed tends to outrun verification depth.
patterns.description: High-impact repeated pattern across multiple sessions.
